title: Dancing Queen
why_this_song: Dancing Queen by ABBA (1976) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Friday night and the lights are low
Looking out for a place to go
Where they play the right music, getting in the swing
You're in the mood for a dance
And when you get the chance

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "dancing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "dancing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "queen" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "queen" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You can dance, you can jive
And when you get the chance
Looking out for another, anyone will do

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Dancing Queen" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Dancing Queen", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Dancing Queen" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Dancing Queen" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Dancing Queen", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Dancing Queen", o que aconteceria?
